rationale.R1.1: The artifact has a minor issue with conceptual reconstruction as the relationship between ATA and state-space models could be clearer.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact has an argument-chain issue: it claims that selective state-space models can match or exceed Transformer accuracy without providing sufficient evidence to support this claim.
